title: Trading Lab Latency Replay
beginner_summary: The paper bot simulated a local result, but the replay found a timing issue. The signal appears newer than the validation time, so the fixture timestamps should be reviewed.
next_safe_action: Review paper fixture timestamps and rerun the latency replay validator.

cards.title: Replay Chain
cards.body: Signal, latency, regime, risk gate, paper decision, and scorecard were reviewed from local paper files.

cards.title: Latency
cards.body: The signal generated time is later than the validation time.

cards.title: Paper Decision
cards.body: The paper result exists, but replay recommends reviewing timestamps before trusting timing quality.

cards.title: Safety
cards.body: Live trading, brokers, OANDA, API keys, secrets, real webhooks, and real orders remain blocked.
